component.name: rocketmq-all
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: fastjson
component.description: Fastjson is a JSON processor (JSON parser + JSON generator) written in Java

component.name: netty-all
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-validator
component.description: Apache Commons Validator provides the building blocks for both client side validation and server side data validation. It may be used standalone or with a framework like Struts.

component.name: commons-beanutils
component.description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

component.name: commons-digester
component.description: The Digester package lets you configure an XML to Java object mapping module which triggers certain actions called rules whenever a particular pattern of nested XML elements is recognized.

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: zstd-jni
component.description: JNI bindings for Zstd native library that provides fast and high compression lossless algorithm for Java and all JVM languages.

component.name: lz4-java
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: opentracing-api
component.description: OpenTracing Java API

component.name: dledger
component.description: A raft-based java library for building high-available, high-durable, strong-consistent commitlog.

component.name: jna
component.description: Java Native Access

component.name: commons-cli
component.description: Commons CLI provides a simple API for presenting, processing and validating a command line interface.

component.name: guava
component.description: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, Google's collections, I/O classes, and much more.

component.name: failureaccess
component.description: Contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its classes is conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the listenablefuture artifact).

component.name: listenablefuture
component.description:
An empty artifact that Guava depends on to signal that it is providing ListenableFuture -- but is also available in a second "version" that contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture class, without any other Guava classes. The idea is:
- If users want only ListenableFuture, they depend on listenablefuture-1.0.
- If users want all of Guava, they depend on guava, which, as of Guava 27.0, depends on listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava. The 9999.0-... version number is enough for some build systems (notably, Gradle) to select that empty artifact over the "real" listenablefuture-1.0 -- avoiding a conflict with the copy of ListenableFuture in guava itself. If users are using an older version of Guava or a build system other than Gradle, they may see class conflicts. If so, they can solve them by manually excluding the listenablefuture artifact or manually forcing their build systems to use 9999.0-....

component.name: jsr305
component.description: JSR305 Annotations for Findbugs

component.name: checker-qual
component.description: checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmer writes to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.

component.name: error_prone_annotations
component.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

component.name: j2objc-annotations
component.description: A set of annotations that provide additional information to the J2ObjC translator to modify the result of translation.

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The Apache Commons Codec package contains simple encoder and decoders for various formats such as Base64 and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: logback-classic
component.description: logback-classic module

component.name: logback-core
component.description: logback-core module

component.name: javassist
component.description: Javassist (JAVA programming ASSISTant) makes Java bytecode manipulation simple. It is a class library for editing bytecodes in Java.

component.name: bcpkix-jdk15on
component.description: The Bouncy Castle Java APIs for CMS, PKCS, EAC, TSP, CMP, CRMF, OCSP, and certificate generation. This jar contains APIs for JDK 1.5 and up. The APIs can be used in conjunction with a JCE/JCA provider such as the one provided with the Bouncy Castle Cryptography APIs.

component.name: bcprov-jdk15on
component.description: The Bouncy Castle Crypto package is a Java implementation of cryptographic algorithms. This jar contains JCE provider and lightweight API for the Bouncy Castle Cryptography APIs for JDK 1.5 and up.

component.name: bcutil-jdk15on
component.description: The Bouncy Castle Java APIs for ASN.1 extension and utility APIs used to support bcpkix and bctls. This jar contains APIs for JDK 1.5 and up.

component.name: log4j
component.description: Apache Log4j 1.2

component.name: annotations-api
component.description: Annotations Package

component.name: truth
component.description: Parent metdata for Truth, a pure-java, strongly typed testing proposition framework.

component.name: error_prone_annotations
component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: openmessaging-api
component.description: openmessaging specification for java

component.name: jaeger-core
component.description: Jaeger Java bindings for OpenTracing API

component.name: opentracing-util
component.description: OpenTracing utilities

component.name: opentracing-noop
component.description: OpenTracing NoOp

component.name: gson
component.description: Gson JSON library

component.name: jaeger-client
component.description: Jaeger Java bindings for OpenTracing API

component.name: jaeger-thrift
component.description: Jaeger Java bindings for OpenTracing API

component.name: libthrift
component.description: Thrift is a software framework for scalable cross-language services development.

component.name: tomcat-embed-core
component.description: Core Tomcat implementation

component.name: tomcat-annotations-api
component.description: Annotations Package

component.name: javax.annotation-api
component.description: Common Annotations for the JavaTM Platform API

component.name: okhttp
component.description: Square鈥檚 meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: okio
component.description: A modern I/O API for Java

component.name: kotlin-stdlib-common
component.description: Kotlin Common Standard Library

component.name: kotlin-stdlib
component.description: Kotlin Standard Library for JVM

component.name: annotations
component.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

component.name: jaeger-tracerresolver
component.description: Jaeger Java bindings for OpenTracing API

component.name: opentracing-tracerresolver
component.description: Resolver API for OpenTracing Tracer implementations.
